sections.heading: Routing
body: TB-3PO emits MIDI on a configurable channel (1–16).
Load a synth into a shadow slot (hush1, Bristol, OB-Xd, Moog, …)
and set the slot's receive channel to match TB-3PO's channel to hear it.

sections.heading: Knobs
body: 1  Density    — chance of a note vs a rest per step
2  Accent     — chance of a note being an accent (loud)
3  Slide      — chance of a note sliding into the next
4  Octaves    — octave range to spread notes across (1–3)
5  Root       — key root (C, C#, …, B)
6  Scale      — Minor / Phrygian / HarmMinor / MinPent / Dorian / Major
7  Length     — pattern length (8, 16, 24, 32 steps)
8  Gate       — note length as % of step time

sections.heading: Pads (4 rows, bottom = row 1)
body: Row 4 (top): steps 1–8. Tap cycles rest → note → accent → slide.
Row 3:       steps 9–16 (for patterns longer than 8).
Row 2:       pattern banks 1–8. Tap to recall, Shift+tap to store.
Row 1:       actions, left to right:
New     regenerate pattern from a fresh seed
Mutate  nudge ~25% of existing steps
Dir     cycle direction: Fwd / Rev / Ping / Rnd
Clear   clear all steps
Stop    stop the sequencer
Play    start the sequencer
Ch−/Ch+ decrement / increment MIDI out channel

sections.heading: LED colors
body: Step pads: white=note, red=accent, blue=slide, off=rest.
Current step blinks yellow as playback moves through the pattern.
Bank row: purple = current bank, grey = other banks.
Action row: teal=New, indigo=Mutate, orange=Dir, pink=Clear, red=Stop, green=Play.

sections.heading: Suspend & exit
body: Back            hide TB-3PO and keep sequencing in the background.
Shift+Back      fully exit (release notes, unload).
Shift+Vol+Back  also suspend (host-level escape).
Shift+Vol+Jog   also full exit.
Re-open from the Tools menu → resume with pattern + position intact.

sections.heading: Sync
body: Tempo follows Move's project BPM automatically.
TB-3PO runs free (not gated by Move's transport) — use the Play/Stop
pads to start/stop.
